title: Unaudited Financial Statements: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Unaudited Financial Statements: Environment and Climate Change Canada
Financial statements provide an accounting of the department’s administration of its public financial affairs and resources to a variety of users both within the government and external to it.
- Unaudited financial statements for the period ending March 31, 2025
- Unaudited financial statements for the period ending March 31, 2024
- Unaudited financial statements for the period ending March 31, 2023
- Unaudited financial statements for the period ending March 31, 2022
- Unaudited financial statements for the period ending March 31, 2021
